ai_summary: Crown Lifters Limited announced the resignation of Mrs. Payal Pravin Madhani, an Independent Director, who also served as Chairperson of the Audit Committee and a Member of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee. Her departure, effective July 14, 2026, due to "personal and professional commitments," significantly impacts the company's governance structure, particularly financial oversight and board independence. While she confirmed no other material reasons, the generic nature of the stated cause could be a minor red flag regarding the underlying factors and necessitates prompt replacement of a key independent board member.
